FITFLIX WELLNESS CLUB

Terms & Conditions

Effective Date: May 10, 2026 Last Updated: May 10, 2026

Welcome to Fitflix Wellness Club Sainikpuri. By using our website and services, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions.

1. Services

Fitflix provides premium fitness, wellness, diagnostic, and coaching services. Detailed program descriptions, pricing structures, and availability schedules are confirmed at the time of your personalized consultation or enrollment.

2. Health & Safety

You are solely responsible for disclosing all relevant health conditions, allergies, and physical limitations to our staff prior to commencing any training program or recovery therapy. Our team may recommend obtaining medical clearance from a qualified healthcare practitioner before enrolling in specific high-intensity exercises or therapies (such as Cryotherapy or HBOT).

3. Bookings & Cancellations

Appointment details, nutritionist scheduling, and club membership terms are provided in full at the time of booking. Cancellation and rescheduling policies may vary depending on the specific package or wellness program you select.

4. Contact Us

If you have any questions or require clarification regarding these Terms & Conditions, please contact us:

Fitflix Wellness Club

Sainikpuri, Hyderabad, Telangana, India

Email: support@fitflix.in
